brief.coreMessage: HIPAA-compliant voice AI for patient communications

headlines: HIPAA-Compliant Voice AI with Sub-200ms Latency
Telnyx Voice AI: Own Network, 99.999% Uptime
Single Platform for HIPAA/SOC2/PCI Compliant Voice AI
Voice AI Co-Located with Telephony for Under 200ms Response
HIPAA-Ready Voice AI for Healthcare Providers
SOC 2 Type II Certified Voice AI with Global Reach
Patient Communication Secured with Telnyx Voice AI
Voice AI Built on a Network Owned by Telnyx
Reliable Patient Voice Communication with 99.999% Uptime
descriptions: Telnyx Voice AI delivers HIPAA-compliant patient communication with sub-200ms latency, leveraging our owned global network.
Use one platform for HIPAA, SOC 2, and PCI compliant voice AI across 140+ countries with 99.999% uptime.
Our voice AI solution integrates inference co-located with telephony infrastructure, ensuring secure and fast patient interactions.
Telnyx owns its network, eliminating third-party delays and ensuring compliance for healthcare communication.
Operate with confidence using voice AI that meets HIPAA, SOC 2 Type II, and PCI standards on a single, reliable platform.
